task_description: Fix three issues with the Local-AI Android app: (1) Replace hardcoded 3-model list with dynamic Hugging Face API fetching GGUF models < 3B params, (2) Fix download failures and false completion, (3) Remove mock inference fallback and fail clearly when native libs unavailable

verification.summary: Build/test verification skipped due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network (Gradle cannot download dependencies). Code reviewed for correctness via semantic review. All review findings addressed in follow-up commit. PR #3 created.
